title: Tournament-prep dense paragraph
text: Q2 2026 stats are in: 12.4M new users (+47% YoY), 89% activation rate, ARR at $215M, NPS of 72. Top markets: US (38%), EU (29%), APAC (24%). Next milestone: Series D by Q4. Read the full report at company.com/q2-2026.

character_tips.maxim: All character classes at 95 WPM. Real work pace.
character_tips.klavochka: Every kind of character at speed, my star ⭐
